title: CaseMine launches ‘AMICUS AI – Advanced’, its most powerful AI model for legal work
description: Legal technology platform CaseMine has announced the launch of AMICUS AI – Advanced, the most powerful and enhanced version of its AI assistant to date, designed for professionals working with the law.With this release, the platform will now offer two versions of the AI: AMICUS AI – Standard and AMICUS AI – Advanced. While the Standard model will continue to remain available, the newly introduced Advanced model brings significant improvements in the depth, accuracy and overall quality of outputs
